title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Carrier India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Carrier India
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
